Details: Records identified from IEEE Xplore, ScienceDirect, MDPI, SpringerLink, ACM DL
No additional records from other sources (grey literature excluded per protocol)
Duplicate records removed using automated deduplication (Zotero) + manual verification
Records excluded based on title and abstract screening against inclusion criteria
Full-text articles assessed for eligibility by two independent reviewers
Total full-text articles excluded with reasons documented
Excluded: Study addresses only single domain without CPST-level integration
Excluded: Narrow AI application without generalization or multi-domain orchestration
Excluded: Insufficient technical rigor, methodological flaws, or irreproducible results
Excluded: Duplicate publication or overlapping dataset from same research group
Studies included in qualitative synthesis and data extraction
